title: Beet Tagine Beef Kabobs
description: A Japanese-inspired twist on traditional tagine, featuring marinated beet and beef kabobs grilled to perfection.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, Dutch mustard, and robust red wine. Add chopped beets and let marinate for 30 minutes.
3. Add beef to the marinade and let it sit for 10-15 minutes.
4. Thread beef and beets onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. In a small bowl, mix together tagine spice blend and raw honey. Brush the mixture onto the kabobs.
6. Brush cooking oil onto the grill grates and place kabobs on the grill.
7. Cook for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until beef is cooked to desired doneness.
8. Transfer kabobs to a serving platter and top with chopped green onion and sesame seeds.
